state.desc: The state of the touch: 1 for Pressed, 2 for Hold, 3 for Released.

rpm.desc: The current RPM (depends on angular velocity)

degreeRotation.desc: The world's roation as a euler.

surfaceArea.desc: The total surface area that the radar can detect

leftSpeed.desc: The speed level of the joint (left side).

rightSpeed.desc: The speed level of the joint (right side).

leftLimit.desc: The max rotation limit on the left side.

rightLimit.desc: The max rotation limit on the right side.

bearingLock.desc: If the joint is locked or not.

wsPower.desc: Power for forward or backward movement.

adPower.desc: Power for left or right movement.

characterName.desc: The name of the seated player.

fov.desc: The fov of the camera in degrees.

fraction.desc: number 0-1 range from the start point to the end point, The higher the value, the closer it is to the end point.

pointLocal.desc: Vec3 The reflection direction in the local side

pointWorld.desc: Vec3 The reflection direction in the world side

type.desc: string Type of object it has hitted

valid.desc: boolean If the raycast was valid or not

color.desc: Color The color it has hitted.

other.desc: The other objects type that collided with the component.

posiiton.desc: The position at witch the collision occured.

selfPointVelocity.desc: The velocity of the component when the collision occured.

otherPointVelocity.desc: The velocity of the other object when the collision occured.

normal.desc: The normal between the component and the collision object.

position.desc: The position in world space where the shape was hit.

attacker.desc: The type of object that meleed the component.

damage.desc: The damage value of the melee attack.

power.desc: The physical impact of the hit.

direction.desc: The direction of the melee attack.

normal.desc: The normal at the point of impact.

hasNoParamsUsableIssue.desc: Whether the audio has no usable parameters

default.desc: The default value of the parameter

maximum.desc: The maximum value of the parameter

minimum.desc: The minimum value of the parameter

characters.desc: All characters that are usable in the font

errorChar.desc: The character used for a gylph that doesn't exist.

charset.desc: string[]> Contains all gylph data for all characters.

metadata.desc: The metadata related to the font

glyphs.desc: ASCFont.Glyph> A table mapping glyph names to their corresponding glyph data

names.desc: string> A table containing font names (e.g., fullname, PostScript name)

ascender.desc: The ascender value for the font, the height of the highest point of any character

descender.desc: The descender value for the font, the depth of the lowest point of any character

underLinePosition.desc: The vertical position where the underline is drawn

boundingBox.desc: The overall bounding box for the font containing the max and min coordinates

resolution.desc: The resolution (typically in DPI) for the font

xMin.desc: The minimum x-coordinate of the font's bounding box

xMax.desc: The maximum x-coordinate of the font's bounding box

yMin.desc: The minimum y-coordinate of the font's bounding box

yMax.desc: The maximum y-coordinate of the font's bounding box

advanceWidth.desc: The width of the glyph, which determines the spacing between it and the next character

metrics.desc: The metrics associated with the glyph, including its bounding box and left bearing

triangles.desc: A table of triangles that define the shape of the glyph

leftBearing.desc: The horizontal distance from the origin to the leftmost edge of the glyph's bounding box

v1.desc: The first vertex of the triangle

v2.desc: The second vertex of the triangle

v3.desc: The third vertex of the triangle

id.desc: The id of the config, recommended to be in the format `[MOD_NAME].[COMPONENT_NAME].[CONFIG_NAME]`

hostOnly.desc: If the configuration is host-only accessible

options.desc: A list of usable options for the config

[string].desc: A table of translations where each element is a string translation
